test_cases.name: happy_path_standard_input
test_cases.scenario: Standard feature list with complete RICE parameters, resource constraints, and 4-quarter planning horizon produces valid quarterly roadmap with all features assigned.

features.name: Dashboard Analytics
features.description: Real-time analytics dashboard for user activity

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill completes all 7 phases, assigns all features to quarters, calculates RICE scores, generates valid JSON roadmap with resource utilization metrics and risk register.
phase_coverage: Phase 1: Validate and Normalize Feature List
Phase 2: Gather and Validate RICE Parameters
Phase 3: Calculate RICE Scores and Rank
Phase 4: Identify and Resolve Dependencies
Phase 5: Estimate Resource Requirements and Identify Risks
Phase 6: Allocate Features to Quarters
Phase 7: Generate Roadmap Document and Risk Summary

test_cases.name: happy_path_with_dependencies
test_cases.scenario: Feature list with hard and soft dependencies correctly identifies critical path, respects blocking relationships in quarterly allocation, and generates dependency graph.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill identifies User Service and Mobile App as dependent on API Foundation, calculates critical path length, flags Mobile App for discovery phase (confidence 0.7), and schedules features respecting hard dependencies.
phase_coverage: Phase 1: Validate and Normalize Feature List
Phase 2: Gather and Validate RICE Parameters
Phase 3: Calculate RICE Scores and Rank
Phase 4: Identify and Resolve Dependencies
Phase 5: Estimate Resource Requirements and Identify Risks
Phase 6: Allocate Features to Quarters
Phase 7: Generate Roadmap Document and Risk Summary

test_cases.name: edge_case_single_feature
test_cases.scenario: Minimal input with single feature, default RICE parameters, and no resource constraints produces valid roadmap with feature assigned to Q1.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill handles minimal input gracefully, uses default RICE parameters (Reach=100, Impact=2, Confidence=0.8), assumes unlimited capacity, and assigns single feature to Q1.
phase_coverage: Phase 1: Validate and Normalize Feature List
Phase 2: Gather and Validate RICE Parameters
Phase 3: Calculate RICE Scores and Rank
Phase 6: Allocate Features to Quarters
Phase 7: Generate Roadmap Document and Risk Summary

test_cases.name: edge_case_low_confidence_features
test_cases.scenario: Feature list with multiple low-confidence features (Confidence < 0.6) correctly flags them for discovery phase and includes them in discovery_phase_candidates output.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill identifies both features as low-confidence, flags them in confidence_flag field, includes them in discovery_phase_candidates array, and adds confidence-based risks to risk_register with discovery phase recommendations.
phase_coverage: Phase 1: Validate and Normalize Feature List
Phase 2: Gather and Validate RICE Parameters
Phase 3: Calculate RICE Scores and Rank
Phase 5: Estimate Resource Requirements and Identify Risks
Phase 7: Generate Roadmap Document and Risk Summary

test_cases.name: error_handling_duplicate_feature_names
test_cases.scenario: Feature list contains duplicate feature names (case-insensitive); skill merges duplicates by combining descriptions and using maximum effort estimate, logs merge decision.

features.name: User Profile
features.description: User profile page with basic info

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill detects duplicate 'User Profile' features, merges them into single feature with combined description and maximum effort (8 days), logs merge decision in validation_report, and proceeds with single merged feature.
phase_coverage: Phase 1: Validate and Normalize Feature List

test_cases.name: error_handling_missing_effort_estimate
test_cases.scenario: Feature missing estimated_effort_days field; skill assigns default value (5 days), flags for review, logs warning, and continues processing.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill detects missing effort estimate for Search Functionality, assigns default 5 days, flags feature for review in validation_flags, logs warning in validation_report, and continues to calculate RICE scores and allocate features.
phase_coverage: Phase 1: Validate and Normalize Feature List
Phase 2: Gather and Validate RICE Parameters
Phase 3: Calculate RICE Scores and Rank

test_cases.name: error_handling_team_over_allocation
test_cases.scenario: Feature list with total effort exceeding team capacity in planning horizon; skill defers over-allocated features to backlog with specific reason and mitigation recommendation.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill allocates Feature A to Q1 and Feature B to Q2 (respecting capacity), defers Feature C to backlog with reason 'Team SmallTeam capacity exhausted', includes mitigation recommendation to extend planning horizon or re-prioritize, and flags over-allocation in resource_summary.
phase_coverage: Phase 5: Estimate Resource Requirements and Identify Risks
Phase 6: Allocate Features to Quarters
Phase 7: Generate Roadmap Document and Risk Summary

test_cases.name: quality_gate_circular_dependency_detection
test_cases.scenario: Feature list with circular dependency (A depends on B, B depends on C, C depends on A); skill detects circular chain, aborts with clear error message, and requests user clarification.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill detects circular dependency chain (A → B → C → A) during Phase 4, aborts execution with error message identifying the circular chain, and requests user to clarify or remove one dependency to break the cycle.
phase_coverage: Phase 4: Identify and Resolve Dependencies

test_cases.name: quality_gate_markdown_output_format
test_cases.scenario: Output format set to 'markdown'; skill generates valid markdown table with quarters, features, effort, team, dependencies, and risk flags; markdown is syntactically valid.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill generates valid markdown roadmap with formatted table containing quarters, features, effort, team assignments, dependencies, and risk flags; includes summary section with statistics and assumptions; markdown is syntactically valid and human-readable.
phase_coverage: Phase 7: Generate Roadmap Document and Risk Summary

test_cases.name: quality_gate_csv_output_format
test_cases.scenario: Output format set to 'csv'; skill generates valid CSV with columns Feature, Quarter, Team, Effort_Days, Start_Date, End_Date, Dependencies, RICE_Score, Risk_Flags; CSV is properly formatted and parseable.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill generates valid CSV roadmap with all required columns (Feature, Quarter, Team, Effort_Days, Start_Date, End_Date, Dependencies, RICE_Score, Risk_Flags); CSV is properly formatted with headers and data rows; output is parseable by standard CSV readers.
phase_coverage: Phase 7: Generate Roadmap Document and Risk Summary

phases.note: Optional phase; not tested in current test suite (stakeholder_approval set to false in all cases)

phases.phase: Phase 1: Validate and Normalize Feature List
phases.note: Comprehensive coverage of duplicate detection, missing fields, normalization, and validation flags

phases.phase: Phase 2: Gather and Validate RICE Parameters
phases.note: Coverage includes default parameter handling, low-confidence detection, and validation

phases.phase: Phase 3: Calculate RICE Scores and Rank
phases.note: RICE score calculation, ranking, and priority flag assignment tested
Dependency graph construction, critical path identification, and circular dependency detection tested

phases.phase: Phase 5: Estimate Resource Requirements and Identify Risks
phases.note: Resource estimation, capacity analysis, risk identification, and over-allocation detection tested
Quarterly allocation, dependency-respecting scheduling, and backlog deferral tested

phases.phase: Phase 7: Generate Roadmap Document and Risk Summary
phases.note: Output format validation (JSON, markdown, CSV), summary statistics, and risk summary tested

quality_gates.gate: Phase 1: No duplicate feature names remain
Phase 1: All numeric fields are positive numbers
Phase 3: Ranking is deterministic and reproducible
Phase 5: Over-allocation is flagged and documented
Phase 6: No feature scheduled before dependencies complete
Phase 7: Output is valid in requested format

error_handlers.error: Phase 6: Feature cannot fit in any quarter

uncovered_areas: Phase 0: Stakeholder approval validation (optional phase; requires stakeholder_approval=true)
Phase 1: Invalid effort value (negative or zero) error handling
Phase 2: Reach = 0 or negative error handling
Phase 5: Team capacity undefined or zero/negative
Phase 6: Planning horizon too short for critical path
Phase 7: Generated output is invalid (internal error)
